items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the demand status and assignment lifecycle visibility, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not indicate any checks or validations related to the demand status or assignment lifecycle, leading to an inconclusive status. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
